proof fn phi_4_glb_gap_unbounded_hi<K: KeyTrait + VerusClone>(m: StrictlyOrderedMap<K>, iter: KeyIterator<K>, glb: KeyIterator<K>)
    requires
        m.valid(),
        m@.contains_key(K::zero_spec()),
        !iter.is_end_spec(),
        m.greatest_lower_bound_spec(iter, glb),
    ensures

{
}
